rows.label: tlk70000033_01_msg0001
rows.name:
Here's an infopon: Other side of moat
there is fancy-schmancy gardens.

rows.label: tlk70000033_01_msg0002
rows.name:
In one corner is a very tall
lookout tower, mo. The view
from the top is spectacular!

rows.label: tlk70000033_01_msg0003
rows.name:
Momimi like high places, but they not
good for health. Give Momimi terrible
urge to jump off to world below.

rows.label: tlk70000033_01_msg0004
rows.name:
After all, might leap to super secret
places from up there! Building roofs
or hidden-away backstreets!

rows.label: tlk70000033_01_msg0005
rows.name:
But Momimi sure landing from that high
hurt like crazy... So probably best to
resist and leave it to daredevils!
